props.name: confirm
props.comment: Show a native `confirm()` before firing the update.

props.name: guards
props.comment: Optional `${from}->${to}` predicates to allow/block specific moves.

props.name: onTransition
props.type: (from: string, to: string, record: RaRecord) => void
props.comment: Side-effect hook fired after the update is dispatched.

props.name: source
props.comment: Record field holding the current state. Defaults to `"status"`.

props.name: transitions
props.comment: Map of state → allowed next states.
